headline: Nothing CEO says phone prices are going to keep going up
summary: Nothing CEO Carl Pei warns that phone prices are set to continue rising. He suggests the best time to upgrade a phone was 'yesterday.' RAM shortages have already impacted Nothing's less expensive mid-range phones.

headline: The world’s first trillionaire is a killer
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO is poised to make him the world's first trillionaire. The article controversially claims Musk's actions directly led to hundreds of thousands of deaths. It highlights his vast wealth contrasted with severe criticisms of his conduct.

headline: Siri is good now??
summary: Apple's digital assistant, Siri, has reportedly seen significant improvements. Users are surprised by the new version after years of inconsistent performance. The article questions if Siri is finally a truly useful tool.

headline: A trillion dollars is a stupid amount of money
summary: Elon Musk has officially become the world's first trillionaire. This colossal amount of wealth signifies immense individual power. The article highlights how difficult it is to comprehend the scale of a trillion dollars.

headline: Save 40% Off a Popular Magnetic Rower Exercise Machine, Now Under $150 Ahead of Father's Day
summary: A popular magnetic rower exercise machine is currently 40% off. The full-body workout equipment is now priced under $150. This deal offers a compact and affordable fitness solution ahead of Father's Day.

headline: Expand Your Home Gym With This Adjustable Weight Bench for Just $38 Shipped on Amazon
summary: An adjustable weight bench is available for only $38, including shipping on Amazon. It's pitched as a perfect accessory to complement dumbbells. Expand your home gym without breaking the bank.

headline: The Powerful Yet Compact JUFINX Cordless Electric Air Duster Drops to $19.99 Ahead of Father's Day
summary: The JUFINX Cordless Electric Air Duster is on sale for $19.99. This powerful yet compact device replaces the need for compressed air canisters. Grab this ideal gadget gift before Father's Day.

headline: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Box Drops to a New Low Price
summary: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Box has hit a new low price. Fans can now acquire this special edition booster box at a significant discount. Expand your collection with this popular crossover set.

headline: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
summary: Elon Musk is now the world's first trillionaire, according to the Bloomberg rich list. His net worth surged following SpaceX's successful stock market debut. SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a valuation of $2.2 trillion.

headline: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
summary: Iran states a deal to end regional fighting is close to being finalized. The agreement is being mediated by the US, Iran, and Pakistan. The successful conclusion of the deal would result in the reopening of Hormuz.

headline: Rugby star Sinfield and authors Blackman and Donaldson lead honours list
summary: Rugby legend Kevin Sinfield has been awarded a knighthood. Renowned authors Malorie Blackman and Julia Donaldson have both been made dames. They are among the prominent figures leading the latest national honours list.

headline: I have a duty to stay on, says Starmer, as he justifies defence spending decisions
summary: Sir Keir Starmer asserts he has a 'duty to stay on' as Labour leader. He defended his 'hard-edged' decisions regarding defence spending. His comments come a day after his defence secretary resigned over a funding dispute.
